chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D – 726 of 2026 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Hearing 1. For orders on office objection Nos.1 to 5 2. For hearing of CMA No.3041/2026 3. For hearing of main case 26.02.2026 M/s Hakim Ali Shaikh, Addl. A.G. Sindh along with SHO/PI Roshan Karara, PS Gulshan-e-Maymar, Karachi. ------------------------------------ Mr. Muhammad Nawaz Dahri, Advocate files his Vakalatnama on behalf of petitioner, taken on record. SHO/PI Roshan Karara, PS Gulshan-e-Maymar, Karachi files report along with copy of roznamcha entry as well as warrant issued by 1st Judicial Magistrate, Karachi West, taken on record. He submits that they have not conducted any raid at the house of the petitioner, however, the Judicial Magistrate concerned issued such warrant and on the basis of the said warrant NCCIA have raided the house of the petitioner and such entry was kept in their record. In so far as the allegation of the harassment to the petitioner is concerned, he submits that they had never harassed the petitioner and his family members nor they intend to do so in future unless required by the provisions of law. Counsel for the petitioner when confronted with the above statement as well as statement, being satisfied seeks disposal of instant petition. 3. Learned Additional A. G. Sindh submitted that official respondents are legally bound to provide legal protection to all the citizens including the petitioner without any discrimination. They after going through the record, ensure that official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection of life, honour and property to the petitioner in the manner that no one shall cause harassment to him. 5.

Sindh submitted that official respondents are legally bound to provide legal protection to all the citizens including the petitioner without any discrimination. They after going through the record, ensure that official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection of life, honour and property to the petitioner in the manner that no one shall cause harassment to him. 5. In view of whatever discussed above, instant petition stands disposed of with directions to official respondents to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide necessary legal protection of 2 life, liberty, honour and property to petitioners in the manner that no one shall cause harassment to them. Learned MIT-II to ensure compliance. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Azeem
